author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 9cc261c4. Extended IntermediateFeatures trait signature from Vec<&'static str> to Vec<String> so variable-block architectures can expose dynamic per-block names. Added impls for VGG, EfficientNet, ConvNeXt, Swin, ViT, U-Net, YOLO, MobileNetV2/V3, DenseNet-121, Inception v3. Every registered vision model is now wrappable in FeatureExtractor. 4 new smoke tests; 289 ferrotorch-vision tests pass.
